tasks.label: Build All (Development)
args: cobc -x -o NGM/utils/imagedisplay.exe NGM/utils/imagedisplay.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/event.exe NGM/utils/event.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/atm.exe NGM/utils/atm.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/highscores.exe NGM/utils/highscores.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/NGM.exe NGM/NGM.cbl && cobc -x -o game.exe game.cbl && echo Build Complete!

tasks.label: Build for Production (with api.exe)
args: python build_config.py && pyinstaller --onefile --noconsole NGM/api_standalone.py -n api --distpath NGM && del NGM\api_standalone.py && echo API built! Now building COBOL... && powershell -Command "(Get-Content NGM/NGM.cbl) -replace 'py ./NGM/api.py', './NGM/api.exe' | Set-Content NGM/NGM_prod.cbl" && powershell -Command "(Get-Content NGM/utils/atm.cbl) -replace 'py ./NGM/api.py', './NGM/api.exe' | Set-Content NGM/utils/atm_prod.cbl" && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/imagedisplay.exe NGM/utils/imagedisplay.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/event.exe NGM/utils/event.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/atm.exe NGM/utils/atm_prod.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/utils/highscores.exe NGM/utils/highscores.cbl && cobc -x -o NGM/NGM.exe NGM/NGM_prod.cbl && cobc -x -o game.exe game.cbl && del NGM\NGM_prod.cbl && del NGM\utils\atm_prod.cbl && echo Production Build Complete!
